title: CLI Scanner + Load Harness — Concurrent Scan Throughput & Result Persistence
description: suite-core/cli/aldeci_scan.py is the CLI entry point. test_load_harness.py validates concurrent request handling with 200/404/500 response classification. Gap: the load harness measures HTTP throughput but does not stress-test the SQLite write path — concurrent scans writing to the same domain DB can cause SQLITE_BUSY errors under high concurrency.
missing: SQLite WAL mode enforcement: verify all engine DBs use WAL+RLock pattern and add a startup check that logs a warning for any DB missing WAL mode
Load harness SQLite stress test: extend test_load_harness.py to run N concurrent scan writers and verify zero SQLITE_BUSY errors
CLI scan result persistence: persist aldeci_scan CLI results to vuln_lifecycle.db automatically so CLI scans appear in the web dashboard
